items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Attackers Use LLM Agent for Post-Exploitation After Marimo CVE-2026-39987 Exploi
id: cdec6d26-802d-5688-93f0-6737753d4c60
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-39987 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: KEV_EXPLOIT
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-39987
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/01
modified: 2026/06/01
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-39987 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-01T10:08:33Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-39987", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-39987 Exploitation Attempt - KEV_EXPLOIT"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:3645109; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-01, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P1] Vulnerability - low severity (Risk 3.57/10). [ALERT] CISA KEV CONFIRMED - actively exploited in the wild. Patch immediately. items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-0257 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-01T10:08:33Z
let lookback = 1d;

| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)

| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)

| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-0257", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"

mitre_tactics.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
